metadata.description: AI-agent skills for extracting structured brand packages from client assets — Figma variables, live website CSS, social copy, brand-guide PDFs, and reference screenshots — into a .brand/ directory plus a spec-compliant design.md and project-root brand.md.

plugins.name: brand-extract
plugins.description: Full brand-extraction pipeline: tokens (Figma + web), voice (website + social + app stores), overview (brand-guide PDF + screenshots), conflicts, and design-system repo scan. Includes /brand-extract and /brand-check slash commands. Playwright MCP recommended; falls back to native WebFetch when absent.
